pipeline_json.name: scn-9

transformations.name: bronze_write_explanationofbenefit_obj17
transformations.post_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_claim_header AS
SELECT
  cast(base.batch_id AS bigint)                                                           AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', 'FHIR_EOB', eob.id, eob.status,
    coalesce(eob.patient.reference,'')), 256)                                             AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                  AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS created_by,
  base.ingest_ts                                                                          AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                     AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                             AS source_system,
  coalesce(eob.id, eob.identifier[0].value)                                              AS source_claim_id,
  CASE
    WHEN upper(trim(eob.type.coding[0].code)) = 'professional'  THEN 'PROF'
    WHEN upper(trim(eob.type.coding[0].code)) = 'oral'          THEN 'DENTAL'
    WHEN upper(trim(eob.type.coding[0].code)) = 'institutional'
         AND filter(eob.supportingInfo,
               s -> s.category.coding[0].code IN ('admission-type','admission')
             )[0] IS NOT NULL                                    THEN 'IP'
    WHEN upper(trim(eob.type.coding[0].code)) = 'institutional'
         AND eob.diagnosisRelatedGroup IS NOT NULL               THEN 'IP'
    WHEN upper(trim(eob.type.coding[0].code)) = 'institutional' THEN 'OP'
    ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
  END                                                                                     AS claim_type,
  eob.id                                                                                  AS source_resource_id,
  eob.resourceType                                                                        AS source_resource_type,
  'FHIR_R4_JSON'                                                                         AS source_format,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', 'FHIR_EOB',
    coalesce(eob.patient.reference, 'UNKNOWN_PATIENT')), 256)                            AS patient_id,
  coalesce(
    filter(eob.careTeam, c -> c.role.coding[0].code = 'billing')[0].provider.identifier[0].value,
    eob.careTeam[0].provider.identifier[0].value
  )                                                                                       AS billing_provider_id,
  coalesce(
    filter(eob.careTeam, c -> c.role.coding[0].code = 'billing')[0].provider.identifier[0].value,
    eob.careTeam[0].provider.identifier[0].value
  )                                                                                       AS billing_provider_npi,
  filter(eob.careTeam,
    c -> c.role.coding[0].code IN ('attending','ATND')
  )[0].provider.identifier[0].value                                                      AS attending_provider_id,
  filter(eob.careTeam,
    c -> c.role.coding[0].code IN ('attending','ATND')
  )[0].provider.identifier[0].value                                                      AS attending_provider_npi,
  coalesce(
    filter(filter(eob.contained,
      c -> c.resourceType = 'Organization')[0].identifier,
      i -> i.type.coding[0].code = 'PRN')[0].value,
    filter(filter(eob.contained,
      c -> c.resourceType = 'Organization')[0].identifier,
      i -> i.system = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/us-npi')[0].value
  )                                                                                       AS source_billing_org_id,
  filter(eob.careTeam,
    c -> c.role.coding[0].code IN ('rendering','performing')
  )[0].provider.identifier[0].value                                                      AS source_rendering_org_id,
  to_date(filter(eob.supportingInfo,
    s -> s.category.coding[0].code IN ('admission-date','admission')
  )[0].timingDate)                                                                        AS admission_date,
  to_date(filter(eob.supportingInfo,
    s -> s.category.coding[0].code = 'discharge-date'
  )[0].timingDate)                                                                        AS discharge_date,
  to_date(eob.billablePeriod.start)                                                      AS statement_from,
  to_date(eob.billablePeriod.`end`)                                                      AS statement_through,
  to_date(filter(eob.supportingInfo,
    s -> s.category.coding[0].code =
      'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/nch_wkly_proc_dt'
  )[0].timingDate)                                                                        AS paid_date,
  to_date(coalesce(
    filter(eob.supportingInfo,
      s -> s.category.coding[0].code = 'clmrecvddate')[0].timingDate,
    filter(eob.supportingInfo,
      s -> s.category.coding[0].code =
        'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/nch_wkly_proc_dt'
    )[0].timingDate,
    eob.billablePeriod.start
  ))                                                                                      AS claim_effective_date,
  to_date(eob.created)                                                                   AS claim_received_date,
  cast(1 AS int)                                                                          AS claim_version_num,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS replaced_claim_id,
  d.drg_code                                                                              AS drg_code,
  d.drg_code_system                                                                       AS drg_code_system,
  concat(
    coalesce(filter(eob.extension,
      e -> e.url = 'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_fac_type_cd'
    )[0].valueCoding.code, ''),
    coalesce(filter(eob.extension,
      e -> e.url = 'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_srvc_clsfctn_type_cd'
    )[0].valueCoding.code, ''),
    coalesce(
      filter(eob.supportingInfo,
        s -> s.code.coding[0].system =
          'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_freq_cd'
      )[0].code.coding[0].code,
      filter(eob.extension,
        e -> e.url = 'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_freq_cd'
      )[0].valueCoding.code,
      ''
    )
  )                                                                                       AS bill_type,
  coalesce(
    filter(eob.supportingInfo,
      s -> s.category.coding[0].code =
        'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_ip_admsn_type_cd'
    )[0].code.coding[0].code,
    filter(eob.extension,
      e -> e.url = 'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_admsn_type_cd'
    )[0].valueCoding.code
  )                                                                                       AS admission_type,
  coalesce(
    filter(eob.supportingInfo,
      s -> s.code.coding[0].system =
        'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_src_ip_admsn_cd'
    )[0].code.coding[0].code,
    filter(eob.extension,
      e -> e.url = 'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_admsn_src_cd'
    )[0].valueCoding.code
  )                                                                                       AS admission_source,
  coalesce(
    filter(eob.supportingInfo,
      s -> s.code.coding[0].system =
        'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/ptnt_dschrg_stus_cd'
    )[0].code.coding[0].code,
    eob.hospitalization.dischargeDisposition.coding[0].code
  )                                                                                       AS discharge_status,
  filter(eob.extension,
    e -> e.url =
      'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_adjsmt_type_cd'
  )[0].valueCoding.code                                                                   AS claim_adjustment_type_cd,
  coalesce(eob.status, 'unknown')                                                        AS claim_status
FROM (
  SELECT
    batch_id, ingest_ts,
    from_json(value,
      'STRUCT<id: STRING, meta: STRUCT<lastUpdated: STRING>,
        resourceType: STRING, status: STRING, created: STRING,
        identifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, value: STRING>>,
        type: STRUCT<text: STRING, coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
        patient: STRUCT<reference: STRING>,
        billablePeriod: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>,
        insurer: STRUCT<reference: STRING, display: STRING>,
        insurance: ARRAY<STRUCT<focal: BOOLEAN, coverage: STRUCT<reference: STRING>>>,
        hospitalization: STRUCT<dischargeDisposition: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING>>>>,
        extension: ARRAY<STRUCT<url: STRING, valueCoding: STRUCT<code: STRING>>>,
        contained: ARRAY<STRUCT<resourceType: STRING, id: STRING,
          identifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<type: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
            system: STRING, value: STRING>>>>,
        careTeam: ARRAY<STRUCT<sequence: INT,
          role: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING>>>,
          provider: STRUCT<reference: STRING, display: STRING,
            identifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<type: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
              system: STRING, value: STRING>>>>>,
        supportingInfo: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          category: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, display: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
          code: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
          timingDate: STRING,
          valueCodeableConcept: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>,
        diagnosisRelatedGroup: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
        related: ARRAY<STRUCT<relationship: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING>>>,
          claim: STRUCT<reference: STRING>>>,
        item: ARRAY<STRUCT<sequence: INT,
          productOrService: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>>') AS eob
  FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
) base
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT b.batch_id,
    max(coalesce(si.valueString,
      si.valueCodeableConcept.coding[0].code,
      si.valueCodeableConcept.text))          AS drg_code,
    max(si.valueCodeableConcept.coding[0].system) AS drg_code_system
  FROM (
    SELECT batch_id,
      from_json(value,
        'STRUCT<id: STRING,
          supportingInfo: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            category: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, display: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
            valueString: STRING,
            valueCodeableConcept: STRUCT<text: STRING,
              coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>>')  AS eob
    FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
  ) b
  LATERAL VIEW outer explode(b.eob.supportingInfo) sv AS si
  WHERE lower(coalesce(si.category.coding[0].code, '')) rlike 'drg|grouper|ms'
     OR lower(coalesce(si.category.coding[0].display, '')) rlike 'drg|grouper|ms'
  GROUP BY b.batch_id
) d ON d.batch_id = base.batch_id
WHERE size(filter(base.eob.item, i ->
    coalesce(i.productOrService.coding[0].system, '') <> 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc'
    AND coalesce(i.productOrService.coding[0].code, '') <> '')) > 0;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_claim_line AS
SELECT
  cast(batch_id AS bigint)                                                                AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', 'FHIR_EOB', claim_fhir_id, cast(item.sequence AS string),
    coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].code,'')), 256)                             AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                  AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS created_by,
  ingest_ts                                                                               AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                     AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                             AS source_system,
  claim_fhir_id                                                                           AS source_claim_id,
  item.sequence                                                                           AS line_number,
  concat_ws(':', claim_fhir_id, cast(item.sequence AS string))                           AS source_line_id,
  to_date(coalesce(item.servicedDate, item.servicedPeriod.start, billable_start))        AS service_date,
  to_date(item.servicedPeriod.`end`)                                                     AS service_end_date,
  coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].code,
    item.productOrService.text)                                                           AS procedure_code,
  item.productOrService.coding[0].system                                                 AS source_code_system,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS procedure_code_version,
  item.revenue.coding[0].code                                                             AS revenue_code,
  item.revenue.coding[0].system                                                           AS revenue_code_system,
  coalesce(item.locationCodeableConcept.coding[0].code,
    item.locationAddress.state)                                                           AS place_of_service,
  cast(item.quantity.value AS decimal(18,4))                                              AS billed_units,
  item.modifier[0].coding[0].code                                                         AS modifier_1,
  item.modifier[1].coding[0].code                                                         AS modifier_2,
  item.modifier[2].coding[0].code                                                         AS modifier_3,
  item.modifier[3].coding[0].code                                                         AS modifier_4,
  item.modifier[4].coding[0].code                                                         AS modifier_5
FROM (
  SELECT
    eob.id                          AS claim_fhir_id,
    eob.billablePeriod.start        AS billable_start,
    posexplode_outer(eob.item)      AS (pos, item),
    batch_id, ingest_ts
  FROM (
    SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
      from_json(value,
        'STRUCT<id: STRING,
          type: STRUCT<text: STRING, coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
          billablePeriod: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>,
          item: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            sequence: INT,
            quantity: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE>,
            servicedPeriod: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>,
            servicedDate: STRING,
            locationAddress: STRUCT<state: STRING>,
            locationCodeableConcept: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
            revenue: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
            modifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING>>>>,
            careTeamSequence: ARRAY<INT>,
            diagnosisSequence: ARRAY<INT>,
            productOrService: STRUCT<text: STRING, coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
            adjudication: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              category: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING>>>,
              amount: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE, currency: STRING>>>,
            procedureSequence: ARRAY<INT>>>>') AS eob
    FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
  ) parsed
  WHERE eob.item IS NOT NULL
) exploded
WHERE coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].system, '') <> 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc'
  AND coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].code, '') <> '';

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_claim_diagnosis AS
SELECT
  cast(batch_id AS bigint)                                                                AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', source_claim_id, cast(diagnosis_sequence AS string),
    source_diagnosis_code), 256)                                                          AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                  AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS created_by,
  ingest_ts                                                                               AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                     AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                             AS source_system,
  source_claim_id,
  source_diagnosis_code,
  source_diagnosis_code_system,
  diagnosis_sequence,
  diagnosis_type,
  poa_flag
FROM (
  SELECT
    eob.id                                                          AS source_claim_id,
    diag.sequence                                                   AS diagnosis_sequence,
    diag.diagnosisCodeableConcept.coding[0].system                 AS source_diagnosis_code_system,
    coalesce(diag.diagnosisCodeableConcept.coding[0].code,
      diag.diagnosisCodeableConcept.text)                          AS source_diagnosis_code,
    regexp_extract(cast(diag.type AS string),
      '\\"code\\":\\"([^\\"]+)\\"', 1)                            AS diagnosis_type,
    filter(diag.extension,
      e -> e.url =
        'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_poa_ind_sw1'
    )[0].valueCoding.code                                           AS poa_flag,
    batch_id, ingest_ts
  FROM (
    SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
      from_json(value,
        'STRUCT<id: STRING,
          type: STRUCT<text: STRING, coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
          diagnosis: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            sequence: INT,
            diagnosisCodeableConcept: STRUCT<text: STRING,
              coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
            type: ARRAY<STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING, display: STRING>>>>,
            extension: ARRAY<STRUCT<url: STRING,
              valueCoding: STRUCT<code: STRING>>>>>,
          item: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            productOrService: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>>') AS eob
    FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
  ) parsed
  LATERAL VIEW explode(eob.diagnosis) t AS diag
  WHERE eob.diagnosis IS NOT NULL
    AND diag.diagnosisCodeableConcept.coding[0].code IS NOT NULL
    AND size(filter(parsed.eob.item, i ->
      coalesce(i.productOrService.coding[0].system, '') <> 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc'
      AND coalesce(i.productOrService.coding[0].code, '') <> '')) > 0
) z;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_claim_procedure AS
SELECT
  cast(lp.batch_id AS bigint)                                                            AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', lp.source_claim_id, cast(lp.line_number AS string),
    cast(lp.procedure_sequence AS string), lp.procedure_code), 256)                     AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                 AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                   AS created_by,
  lp.ingest_ts                                                                           AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                   AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                    AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                            AS source_system,
  lp.source_claim_id,
  lp.procedure_sequence,
  lp.procedure_code                                                                      AS source_procedure_code,
  lp.procedure_system                                                                    AS source_procedure_code_system,
  lp.procedure_type,
  lp.procedure_date
FROM (
  SELECT
    lp_inner.batch_id,
    lp_inner.ingest_ts,
    lp_inner.source_claim_id,
    lp_inner.line_number,
    pr.procedure_sequence,
    pr.procedure_code,
    pr.procedure_system,
    pr.procedure_type,
    to_date(coalesce(lp_inner.serviced_date, lp_inner.serviced_period_start)) AS procedure_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      eob.id                                                 AS source_claim_id,
      item.sequence                                          AS line_number,
      concat_ws(':', eob.id, cast(item.sequence AS string)) AS source_line_id,
      item.servicedDate                                      AS serviced_date,
      item.servicedPeriod.start                              AS serviced_period_start,
      proc_seq,
      batch_id, ingest_ts
    FROM (
      SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
        from_json(value,
          'STRUCT<id: STRING,
            item: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              sequence: INT,
              productOrService: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
              procedureSequence: ARRAY<INT>,
              servicedDate: STRING,
              servicedPeriod: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>>>,
            procedure: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              sequence: INT,
              date: STRING,
              type: ARRAY<STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>,
              procedureCodeableConcept: STRUCT<text: STRING,
                coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>,
            type: STRUCT<text: STRING, coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>') AS eob
      FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
    ) base
    LATERAL VIEW explode(eob.item)                     it AS item
    LATERAL VIEW outer explode(item.procedureSequence) ps AS proc_seq
    WHERE eob.item      IS NOT NULL
      AND eob.procedure IS NOT NULL
      AND proc_seq      IS NOT NULL
      AND coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].system, '') <> 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc'
  ) lp_inner
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT
      eob.id                                                                AS source_claim_id,
      proc.sequence                                                         AS procedure_sequence,
      coalesce(proc.procedureCodeableConcept.coding[0].system, 'UNKNOWN')  AS procedure_system,
      coalesce(
        proc.procedureCodeableConcept.coding[0].code,
        proc.procedureCodeableConcept.text
      )                                                                     AS procedure_code,
      filter(proc.type, t -> t IS NOT NULL)[0].coding[0].code              AS procedure_type,
      proc.date                                                             AS procedure_date,
      batch_id
    FROM (
      SELECT batch_id,
        from_json(value,
          'STRUCT<id: STRING,
            procedure: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              sequence: INT,
              date: STRING,
              type: ARRAY<STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>,
              procedureCodeableConcept: STRUCT<text: STRING,
                coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>>') AS eob
      FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
    ) p
    LATERAL VIEW explode(eob.procedure) t AS proc
    WHERE eob.procedure IS NOT NULL
  ) pr
    ON  pr.source_claim_id    = lp_inner.source_claim_id
    AND pr.procedure_sequence = lp_inner.proc_seq
    AND pr.batch_id           = lp_inner.batch_id

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    batch_id,
    ingest_ts,
    eob.id                                                AS source_claim_id,
    item.sequence                                         AS line_number,
    item.sequence                                         AS procedure_sequence,
    coalesce(
      item.productOrService.coding[0].code,
      item.productOrService.text
    )                                                     AS procedure_code,
    coalesce(
      item.productOrService.coding[0].system,
      'UNKNOWN'
    )                                                     AS procedure_system,
    cast(null AS string)                                  AS procedure_type,
    to_date(coalesce(
      item.servicedDate,
      item.servicedPeriod.start
    ))                                                    AS procedure_date
  FROM (
    SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
      from_json(value,
        'STRUCT<id: STRING,
          type: STRUCT<text: STRING, coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
          item: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            sequence: INT,
            servicedDate: STRING,
            servicedPeriod: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>,
            productOrService: STRUCT<text: STRING,
              coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
            procedureSequence: ARRAY<INT>>>,
          procedure: ARRAY<STRUCT<sequence: INT>>>') AS eob
    FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
  ) base
  LATERAL VIEW explode(eob.item) it AS item
  WHERE eob.item      IS NOT NULL
    AND eob.procedure IS NULL
    AND coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].system, '') <> 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc'
    AND coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].code,   '') <> ''
    AND size(filter(eob.type.coding,
          c -> c.code IN ('professional','CARRIER','71','72','73','74')
        )) > 0
) lp;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_claim_provider AS
SELECT
  cast(batch_id AS bigint)                                                                AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', eob.id, cast(ct.sequence AS string),
    coalesce(ct.role.coding[0].code, ''), 'HEADER'), 256)                                AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                  AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS created_by,
  ingest_ts                                                                               AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                     AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                             AS source_system,
  eob.id                                                                                  AS source_claim_id,
  ct.sequence                                                                             AS provider_sequence,
  ct.role.coding[0].code                                                                  AS provider_role_code,
  ct.role.coding[0].system                                                                AS provider_role_system,
  ct.provider.identifier[0].system                                                        AS provider_identifier_system,
  ct.provider.identifier[0].value                                                         AS provider_identifier_value,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS source_line_id,
  'HEADER'                                                                                AS provider_scope,
  filter(ct.provider.identifier, i -> i.system LIKE '%npi%')[0].value                   AS npi,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS tin
FROM (
  SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
    from_json(value,
      'STRUCT<id: STRING,
        item: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          sequence: INT,
          careTeamSequence: ARRAY<INT>,
          productOrService: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>,
        careTeam: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          sequence: INT,
          role: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
          provider: STRUCT<
            reference: STRING, display: STRING,
            identifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              type: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
              system: STRING, value: STRING>>>>>>') AS eob
  FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
) base
LATERAL VIEW explode(eob.careTeam) ctm AS ct
WHERE eob.careTeam IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT
  cast(batch_id AS bigint)                                                                AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', eob.id, cast(item.sequence AS string),
    cast(ct.sequence AS string), coalesce(ct.role.coding[0].code, ''), 'LINE'), 256)    AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                  AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS created_by,
  ingest_ts                                                                               AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                     AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                             AS source_system,
  eob.id                                                                                  AS source_claim_id,
  ct.sequence                                                                             AS provider_sequence,
  ct.role.coding[0].code                                                                  AS provider_role_code,
  ct.role.coding[0].system                                                                AS provider_role_system,
  ct.provider.identifier[0].system                                                        AS provider_identifier_system,
  ct.provider.identifier[0].value                                                         AS provider_identifier_value,
  cast(item.sequence AS string)                                                           AS source_line_id,
  'LINE'                                                                                  AS provider_scope,
  filter(ct.provider.identifier, i -> i.system LIKE '%npi%')[0].value                   AS npi,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS tin
FROM (
  SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
    from_json(value,
      'STRUCT<id: STRING,
        item: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          sequence: INT,
          careTeamSequence: ARRAY<INT>,
          productOrService: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>,
        careTeam: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          sequence: INT,
          role: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
          provider: STRUCT<
            reference: STRING, display: STRING,
            identifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              type: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
              system: STRING, value: STRING>>>>>>') AS eob
  FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
) base
LATERAL VIEW explode(eob.item) it AS item
LATERAL VIEW outer explode(item.careTeamSequence) cs AS cts
LATERAL VIEW explode(eob.careTeam) ctm AS ct
WHERE eob.item IS NOT NULL
  AND cts IS NOT NULL
  AND ct.sequence = cts
  AND coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].system, '') <> 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc';

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_claim_line_adjudication AS
SELECT
  cast(batch_id AS bigint)                                                                AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', source_claim_id, coalesce(source_line_id, 'H'),
    coalesce(adjudication_category_code, ''),
    cast(amount AS string)), 256)                                                         AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                  AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS created_by,
  ingest_ts                                                                               AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                     AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                             AS source_system,
  source_claim_id,
  source_line_id,
  adjudication_type,
  adjudication_category_code,
  adjudication_category_system,
  adjudication_reason_code,
  adjudication_reason_system,
  cast(amount AS decimal(18,4))                                                           AS amount,
  currency,
  value
FROM (
  SELECT
    batch_id, ingest_ts,
    eob.id                              AS source_claim_id,
    cast(item.sequence AS string)       AS source_line_id,
    cast(null AS string)                AS adjudication_type,
    adj.category.coding[0].code         AS adjudication_category_code,
    adj.category.coding[0].system       AS adjudication_category_system,
    adj.reason.coding[0].code           AS adjudication_reason_code,
    adj.reason.coding[0].system         AS adjudication_reason_system,
    adj.amount.value                    AS amount,
    adj.amount.currency                 AS currency,
    cast(adj.value AS string)           AS value
  FROM (
    SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
      from_json(value,
        'STRUCT<id: STRING,
          item: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            sequence: INT,
            productOrService: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
            adjudication: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              category: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
              reason: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
              amount: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE, currency: STRING>,
              value: DOUBLE>>>>>') AS eob
    FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
  ) p
  LATERAL VIEW explode(eob.item) t AS item
  LATERAL VIEW outer explode(item.adjudication) a AS adj
  WHERE eob.item IS NOT NULL
    AND item.adjudication IS NOT NULL
    AND adj IS NOT NULL
    AND coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].system, '') <> 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc'
) u;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_claim_adjudication AS
SELECT
  cast(batch_id AS bigint)                                                                AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', source_claim_id,
    coalesce(adjudication_category_code, ''),
    cast(amount AS string)), 256)                                                         AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                  AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS created_by,
  ingest_ts                                                                               AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                     AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                             AS source_system,
  source_claim_id,
  adjudication_type,
  adjudication_category_code,
  adjudication_category_system,
  adjudication_reason_code,
  adjudication_reason_system,
  cast(amount AS decimal(18,4))                                                           AS amount,
  currency,
  value
FROM (
  SELECT
    batch_id, ingest_ts,
    eob.id                              AS source_claim_id,
    cast(null AS string)                AS adjudication_type,
    tot.category.coding[0].code         AS adjudication_category_code,
    tot.category.coding[0].system       AS adjudication_category_system,
    cast(null AS string)                AS adjudication_reason_code,
    cast(null AS string)                AS adjudication_reason_system,
    tot.amount.value                    AS amount,
    tot.amount.currency                 AS currency,
    cast(null AS string)                AS value
  FROM (
    SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
      from_json(value,
        'STRUCT<id: STRING,
          total: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            category: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
            amount: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE, currency: STRING>>>>') AS eob
    FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
  ) p2
  LATERAL VIEW outer explode(eob.total) tt AS tot

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    batch_id, ingest_ts,
    eob.id                              AS source_claim_id,
    cast(null AS string)                AS adjudication_type,
    CASE
      WHEN adj.reason.coding[0].code = 'IME'                THEN 'ime'
      WHEN adj.reason.coding[0].code = 'DSH'                THEN 'dsh'
      WHEN adj.reason.coding[0].code = 'uncompensated-care' THEN 'uncompensated_care'
      ELSE adj.reason.coding[0].code
    END                                 AS adjudication_category_code,
    coalesce(adj.reason.coding[0].system,
      'payer-defined')                  AS adjudication_category_system,
    adj.reason.coding[0].code           AS adjudication_reason_code,
    adj.reason.coding[0].system         AS adjudication_reason_system,
    adj.amount.value                    AS amount,
    adj.amount.currency                 AS currency,
    cast(null AS string)                AS value
  FROM (
    SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
      from_json(value,
        'STRUCT<id: STRING,
          payment: STRUCT<
            adjustment: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              reason: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
              amount: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE, currency: STRING>>>>>') AS eob
    FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
  ) p3
  LATERAL VIEW outer explode(eob.payment.adjustment) pa AS adj
  WHERE adj IS NOT NULL
) u;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_pharmacy_claim_header AS
SELECT
  cast(base.batch_id AS bigint)                                                           AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', 'FHIR_EOB', eob.id, eob.status,
    coalesce(eob.patient.reference,'')), 256)                                             AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                  AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS created_by,
  base.ingest_ts                                                                          AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                     AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                             AS source_system,
  coalesce(eob.id, eob.identifier[0].value)                                              AS source_claim_id,
  'RX'                                                                                    AS claim_type,
  eob.identifier[0].value                                                                 AS external_claim_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', 'FHIR_EOB',
    coalesce(eob.patient.reference, 'UNKNOWN_PATIENT')), 256)                            AS patient_id,
  eob.insurance[0].coverage.reference                                                     AS primary_payer_id,
  to_date(eob.billablePeriod.start)                                                      AS claim_effective_date,
  coalesce(eob.status, 'unknown')                                                        AS claim_status,
  filter(eob.extension,
    e -> e.url =
      'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_mdcr_non_pmt_rsn_cd'
  )[0].valueCoding.code                                                                   AS denial_reason
FROM (
  SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
    from_json(value,
      'STRUCT<id: STRING, status: STRING,
        identifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, value: STRING>>,
        type: STRUCT<text: STRING, coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
        patient: STRUCT<reference: STRING>,
        billablePeriod: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>,
        insurance: ARRAY<STRUCT<focal: BOOLEAN, coverage: STRUCT<reference: STRING>>>,
        extension: ARRAY<STRUCT<url: STRING,
          valueCoding: STRUCT<code: STRING>,
          valueMoney: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE, currency: STRING>>>,
        item: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          sequence: INT,
          productOrService: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>>') AS eob
  FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
) base
WHERE size(filter(base.eob.item, i ->
    coalesce(i.productOrService.coding[0].system, '') = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc'
    AND coalesce(i.productOrService.coding[0].code, '') <> '')) > 0;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_pharmacy_claim_line AS
SELECT
  cast(batch_id AS bigint)                                                                AS batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', 'FHIR_EOB', claim_fhir_id, cast(item.sequence AS string),
    coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].code,'')), 256)                             AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                                                  AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS created_by,
  ingest_ts                                                                               AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS updated_by,
  current_timestamp()                                                                     AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_EOB'                                                                             AS source_system,
  claim_fhir_id                                                                           AS source_claim_id,
  item.sequence                                                                           AS line_number,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', 'FHIR_EOB',
    coalesce(patient_ref, 'UNKNOWN_PATIENT')), 256)                                      AS patient_id,
  'RX'                                                                                    AS claim_type,
  to_date(item.servicedDate)                                                             AS prescription_date,
  to_date(item.servicedDate)                                                             AS filled_date,
  to_date(coalesce(item.servicedDate,
    item.servicedPeriod.start, billable_start))                                           AS service_date,
  item.productOrService.coding[0].code                                                    AS ndc_code,
  cast(null AS string)                                                                    AS source_drug_code,
  item.productOrService.coding[0].system                                                  AS source_code_system,
  cast(item.quantity.value AS decimal(18,4))                                              AS quantity,
  cast(filter(si_all,
    s -> s.category.coding[0].code = 'dayssupply'
  )[0].valueQuantity.value AS int)                                                        AS days_supply,
  filter(care_team,
    c -> c.role.coding[0].code = 'prescribing'
  )[0].provider.identifier[0].value                                                      AS prescriber_id,
  filter(care_team,
    c -> c.role.coding[0].code = 'prescribing'
  )[0].provider.identifier[0].value                                                      AS prescriber_npi,
  filter(care_team,
    c -> c.role.coding[0].code = 'pharmacy'
  )[0].provider.identifier[0].value                                                      AS dispensing_facility_id,
  cast(filter(item.adjudication,
    a -> a.category.coding[0].code = 'submitted'
  )[0].amount.value AS decimal(18,4))                                                    AS line_charge,
  cast(filter(item.adjudication,
    a -> a.category.coding[0].code = 'benefit'
  )[0].amount.value AS decimal(18,4))                                                    AS allowed_amount,
  cast(coalesce(
    filter(item.adjudication,
      a -> a.category.coding[0].code = 'provider_paid')[0].amount.value,
    filter(item.adjudication,
      a -> a.category.coding[0].code =
        'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/ptnt_pay_amt')[0].amount.value
  ) AS decimal(18,4))                                                                     AS plan_paid_amount,
  cast(filter(item.adjudication,
    a -> a.category.coding[0].code = 'patientresponsibility'
  )[0].amount.value AS decimal(18,4))                                                    AS member_responsibility,
  coalesce(eob_status, 'unknown')                                                        AS claim_status,
  denial_reason
FROM (
  SELECT
    eob.id                    AS claim_fhir_id,
    eob.status                AS eob_status,
    eob.patient.reference     AS patient_ref,
    eob.careTeam              AS care_team,
    eob.supportingInfo        AS si_all,
    eob.billablePeriod.start  AS billable_start,
    filter(eob.extension,
      e -> e.url =
        'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/clm_mdcr_non_pmt_rsn_cd'
    )[0].valueCoding.code     AS denial_reason,
    posexplode_outer(eob.item) AS (pos, item),
    batch_id, ingest_ts
  FROM (
    SELECT batch_id, ingest_ts,
      from_json(value,
        'STRUCT<id: STRING, status: STRING,
          identifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, value: STRING>>,
          type: STRUCT<text: STRING, coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
          patient: STRUCT<reference: STRING>,
          billablePeriod: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>,
          extension: ARRAY<STRUCT<url: STRING,
            valueCoding: STRUCT<code: STRING>,
            valueMoney: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE, currency: STRING>>>,
          careTeam: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            sequence: INT,
            role: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING>>>,
            provider: STRUCT<reference: STRING,
              identifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<
                type: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
                system: STRING, value: STRING>>>>>,
          supportingInfo: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            category: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING, system: STRING>>>,
            valueQuantity: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE, unit: STRING>,
            timingDate: STRING>>,
          item: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            sequence: INT,
            servicedDate: STRING,
            servicedPeriod: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>,
            quantity: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE>,
            productOrService: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>,
            adjudication: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              category: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING>>>,
              amount: STRUCT<value: DOUBLE, currency: STRING>>>>>>') AS eob
    FROM main.view_test.explanationofbenefit
  ) parsed
  WHERE eob.item IS NOT NULL
) exploded
WHERE coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].system, '') = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/ndc'
  AND coalesce(item.productOrService.coding[0].code, '') <> '';

transformations.name: bronze_write_patient_obj18
transformations.post_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW main.view_test.D0284_patient AS
WITH parsed_patient AS (
  SELECT
    cast(batch_id AS bigint)  AS batch_id,
    ingest_ts,
    created_ts,
    updated_ts,
    from_json(value,
      'STRUCT<
        id: STRING,
        gender: STRING,
        birthDate: STRING,
        deceasedBoolean: BOOLEAN,
        deceasedDateTime: STRING,
        name: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          use: STRING, family: STRING,
          given: ARRAY<STRING>>>,
        identifier: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          system: STRING,
          value: STRING,
          type: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            system: STRING, code: STRING,
            extension: ARRAY<STRUCT<
              url: STRING,
              valueCoding: STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>>,
          period: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>>>,
        address: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          line: ARRAY<STRING>,
          city: STRING, state: STRING,
          postalCode: STRING, country: STRING>>,
        extension: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          url: STRING,
          valueCoding: STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>,
          extension: ARRAY<STRUCT<
            url: STRING,
            valueCoding: STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>>>
      >') AS pt
  FROM main.view_test.patient
),
parsed_coverage AS (
  SELECT
    from_json(value,
      'STRUCT<
        id: STRING,
        status: STRING,
        beneficiary: STRUCT<reference: STRING>,
        period: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>,
        class: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          type: STRUCT<coding: ARRAY<STRUCT<code: STRING>>>,
          value: STRING,
          period: STRUCT<start: STRING, end: STRING>>>,
        extension: ARRAY<STRUCT<
          url: STRING,
          valueCoding: STRUCT<system: STRING, code: STRING>>>
      >') AS cov
  FROM main.view_test.coverage
),
coverage_agg AS (
  SELECT
    REPLACE(cov.beneficiary.reference, 'Patient/', '')               AS patient_id,
    first_value(
      filter(cov.extension,
        e -> e.url = 'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/ms_cd'
      )[0].valueCoding.code
    ) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY cov.beneficiary.reference)     AS mdcr_status_code,
    first_value(
      filter(cov.extension,
        e -> e.url RLIKE
          'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/dual_[0-9]{2}$'
      )[0].valueCoding.code
    ) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY cov.beneficiary.reference)     AS dual_status_code,
    first_value(
      filter(cov.extension,
        e -> e.url = 'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/orec'
      )[0].valueCoding.code
    ) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY cov.beneficiary.reference)     AS original_entitlement_reason_code,
    first_value(
      filter(cov.extension,
        e -> e.url RLIKE
          'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/buyin[0-9]{2}$'
      )[0].valueCoding.code
    ) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY cov.beneficiary.reference)     AS entitlement_buyin_indicator,
    first_value(
      coalesce(
        filter(cov.class, c -> c.value = 'PARTA')[0].period.start,
        filter(cov.extension,
          e -> e.url LIKE '%parta%')[0].valueCoding.code
      )
    ) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY cov.beneficiary.reference)     AS part_a_enrollment_begin_date,
    first_value(
      coalesce(
        filter(cov.class, c -> c.value = 'PARTB')[0].period.start,
        filter(cov.extension,
          e -> e.url LIKE '%partb%')[0].valueCoding.code
      )
    ) IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY cov.beneficiary.reference)     AS part_b_enrollment_begin_date
  FROM parsed_coverage
  WHERE cov.beneficiary.reference IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  pp.batch_id,
  sha2(concat_ws('|', 'FHIR_PATIENT', pt.id,
    coalesce(pt.gender,''), coalesce(pt.birthDate,'')), 256)          AS record_hash,
  cast(false AS boolean)                                               AS is_deleted,
  cast(null AS string)                                                 AS created_by,
  pp.created_ts                                                        AS created_at,
  cast(null AS string)                                                 AS updated_by,
  pp.updated_ts                                                        AS updated_at,
  'FHIR_PATIENT'                                                       AS source_system,
  coalesce(
    filter(pt.identifier,
      i -> i.type.coding[0].code = 'member-id'
    )[0].value,
    filter(pt.identifier,
      i -> i.type.coding[0].code = 'MB'
    )[0].value,
    cov_agg.patient_id,
    pt.id
  )                                                                    AS source_member_id,
  coalesce(
    filter(pt.identifier, i ->
      i.system = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/us-mbi'
      AND i.type.coding[0].code = 'MC'
      AND filter(i.type.coding[0].extension,
            e -> e.url =
              'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/codesystem/identifier-currency'
              AND e.valueCoding.code = 'current'
          )[0] IS NOT NULL
    )[0].value,
    filter(pt.identifier,
      i -> i.system = 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/us-mbi'
    )[0].value
  )                                                                    AS mbi_id,
  filter(pt.identifier,
    i -> i.system LIKE '%hicn%'
  )[0].value                                                           AS hicn,
  pt.name[0].given[0]                                                  AS first_name,
  pt.name[0].given[1]                                                  AS middle_name,
  pt.name[0].family                                                    AS last_name,
  to_date(pt.birthDate)                                                AS date_of_birth,
  to_date(pt.deceasedDateTime)                                         AS deceased_date,
  coalesce(
    pt.deceasedBoolean,
    pt.deceasedDateTime IS NOT NULL
  )                                                                    AS death_indicator,
  upper(pt.gender)                                                     AS gender,
  coalesce(
    filter(pt.extension,
      e -> e.url =
        'https://bluebutton.cms.gov/resources/variables/race'
    )[0].valueCoding.code,
    filter(pt.extension,
      e -> e.url =
        'http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-race'
    )[0].extension[0].valueCoding.code,
    filter(pt.extension,
      e -> e.url LIKE '%race%'
    )[0].valueCoding.code
  )                                                                    AS race_code,
  filter(pt.extension,
    e -> e.url LIKE '%ethnicity%'
  )[0].valueCoding.code                                                AS ethnicity_code,
  pt.address[0].line[0]                                                AS address_line1,
  pt.address[0].line[1]                                                AS address_line2,
  pt.address[0].city                                                   AS city,
  pt.address[0].state                                                  AS state,
  pt.address[0].postalCode                                             AS zip_code,
  pt.address[0].country                                                AS country,
  pt.address[0].line[2]                                                AS address_line3,
  pt.address[0].line[3]                                                AS address_line4,
  pt.address[0].line[4]                                                AS address_line5,
  pt.address[0].line[5]                                                AS address_line6,
  cast(null AS string)                                                 AS county_fips_code,
  cast(null AS string)                                                 AS state_fips_code,
  regexp_extract(coalesce(pt.address[0].postalCode, ''),
    '^([0-9]{5})', 1)                                                  AS zip5,
  regexp_extract(coalesce(pt.address[0].postalCode, ''),
    '(?:-([0-9]{4})|([0-9]{4})$)', 1)                                 AS zip4,
  cov_agg.mdcr_status_code,
  cov_agg.dual_status_code,
  cov_agg.original_entitlement_reason_code,
  cov_agg.entitlement_buyin_indicator,
  to_date(cov_agg.part_a_enrollment_begin_date)                        AS part_a_enrollment_begin_date,
  to_date(cov_agg.part_b_enrollment_begin_date)                        AS part_b_enrollment_begin_date,
  cast(null AS date)                                                   AS bene_rng_bgn_dt,
  cast(null AS date)                                                   AS bene_rng_end_dt
FROM parsed_patient pp
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT patient_id,
    first_value(mdcr_status_code)
      IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY patient_id)              AS mdcr_status_code,
    first_value(dual_status_code)
      IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY patient_id)              AS dual_status_code,
    first_value(original_entitlement_reason_code)
      IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY patient_id)              AS original_entitlement_reason_code,
    first_value(entitlement_buyin_indicator)
      IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY patient_id)              AS entitlement_buyin_indicator,
    first_value(part_a_enrollment_begin_date)
      IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY patient_id)              AS part_a_enrollment_begin_date,
    first_value(part_b_enrollment_begin_date)
      IGNORE NULLS OVER (PARTITION BY patient_id)              AS part_b_enrollment_begin_date
  FROM coverage_agg
) cov_agg ON cov_agg.patient_id = pt.id
WHERE pt.id IS NOT NULL;

pipeline_json.description: Cloned from File to DB Ingestion V2
